name: GeoEye, Inc.
description: GeoEye, Inc. was a leading American commercial satellite imagery provider. The company operated high-resolution Earth-imaging satellites and provided geospatial information, imagery, and tactical solutions to government and commercial customers worldwide, including the U.S. National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency and Google. GeoEye was originally founded as ORBIMAGE in 1992 before rebranding to GeoEye in 2006, and was subsequently acquired by DigitalGlobe in January 2013.
